svg.title: RemitChain end-to-end production flow
svg.desc: 18-step sequence across 4 lanes (sender, app/backend, smart contracts, recipient). Covers onboarding via QIE Pass, funding via QIEDex, transfer initiation with FX rate fetch, escrow locking via EscrowVault, event-driven SMS notification, OTP claim flow with relayer, and off-ramp settlement via UPI/GCash. Refund branch shown for 48-hour timeout scenario.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does QIE Pass authentication work for senders?')
sendPrompt('How does the sender top up QUSD via UPI?')
sendPrompt('How does QIEDex swap fiat to QUSD on-chain?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the send screen UX')
sendPrompt('How does the app fetch live FX rates from QIE Oracle?')
sendPrompt('What does the confirm screen show before signing?')
sendPrompt('How does EscrowVault lock funds safely?')
sendPrompt('What fields are in the TransferInitiated event?')
sendPrompt('How does the viem event listener handle TransferInitiated?')
sendPrompt('How is the SMS localized to the recipient language?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the recipient claim screen')
sendPrompt('How does the backend validate OTP and prevent replay?')
sendPrompt('What does the relayer wallet do exactly?')
sendPrompt('How does releaseFunds calculate and route the 0.1% fee?')
sendPrompt('How does the off-ramp API push to UPI or GCash?')
sendPrompt('Total time from sender confirm to recipient cash?')
sendPrompt('Who can call cancelRemittance and when?')

svg.text: phases: A onboard · B fund · C initiate · D escrow · E notify · F claim · G off-ramp
